kwargs.content: A content-repurposing engine. Takes blog posts and automatically generates social media.

# Content Repurposing Platform

Your vision reminds me of elegant AI-powered tools like Jasper and Copy.ai, with a modern, streamlined interface that emphasizes automation and creativity. 

**Design Inspiration:**
Clean dashboard layouts from Notion, combined with the smooth content flow of Buffer's scheduling interface

**Key Features for V1:**
- Smart text parsing to extract key quotes and insights from blog posts
- Multi-format converter (Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, Instagram captions)
- AI-powered content suggestions and hashtag recommendations
- Visual template library for social media graphics
- Batch scheduling and analytics dashboard

Wait a moment while I build your landing page.

projectPlan.summary: A content-repurposing engine that automatically transforms blog posts into social media content.

contentStrategy.identifiedCoreEmotionalDriver: Relief: The primary emotional driver is relief from the time-consuming burden and frustration of manual content repurposing, combined with the security of knowing your content strategy is consistently executed.
contentStrategy.attentionGrabber: Turn One Blog Post Into a Month of Social Media Content - In Just 60 Seconds
contentStrategy.empathyProblemStatement: Spending hours copying, pasting, and reformatting your blog content for social media? Watching great content go to waste because you can't keep up with all the platforms? We get it - you're a content creator, not a copy-paste machine.
contentStrategy.emotionalBridge: Imagine transforming your content creation process from a draining daily grind into a smooth, automated flow. From struggling to maintain consistency across platforms to having a steady stream of engaging social posts - all while you focus on what really matters: creating great content.
contentStrategy.productRevealSolutionPitch: ContentEngine is your AI-powered content multiplication machine. Drop in your blog post, and watch as it instantly generates platform-perfect posts for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, and Facebook - complete with hashtags, formatting, and engagement hooks. It's like having a social media team in your pocket.
contentStrategy.socialProofAngle: Focus on time saved and content reach metrics: '3,000+ content creators have saved 120,000+ hours and generated 10M+ social impressions using ContentEngine'
contentStrategy.urgencyScarcityHook: Early adopter pricing ends soon - Lock in lifetime access at 50% off before we switch to monthly pricing next week.
contentStrategy.pageMood: Like a high-performance content studio - professional, dynamic, and empowering. The feeling of watching a well-oiled machine efficiently transform raw material into polished output.
contentStrategy.visualEvocation: Clean, dynamic layout with flowing transitions suggesting content transformation. Split-screen demonstrations showing 'before/after' content examples. Accent colors highlighting transformation points. Smooth animations showing content flowing from blog format to various social media formats.
contentStrategy.synthesizedLandingPageCopy:
Turn One Blog Post Into a Month of Social Media Content - In Just 60 Seconds

Spending hours copying, pasting, and reformatting your blog content for social media? Watching great content go to waste because you can't keep up with all the platforms? We get it - you're a content creator, not a copy-paste machine.

Imagine transforming your content creation process from a draining daily grind into a smooth, automated flow. From struggling to maintain consistency across platforms to having a steady stream of engaging social posts - all while you focus on what really matters: creating great content.

ContentEngine is your AI-powered content multiplication machine. Drop in your blog post, and watch as it instantly generates platform-perfect posts for LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, and Facebook - complete with hashtags, formatting, and engagement hooks. It's like having a social media team in your pocket.

✓ Instant platform-specific formatting
✓ AI-generated hashtag recommendations
✓ Engagement-optimized excerpts
✓ Auto-scheduled posting queue
✓ Performance tracking dashboard

Join 3,000+ content creators who have saved 120,000+ hours and generated 10M+ social impressions using ContentEngine. Our users report average engagement increases of 312% while cutting their content management time by 80%.

'ContentEngine has literally given me my weekends back. What used to take hours now happens with a single click.' - Sarah Chen, Content Marketing Manager

🚀 Early adopter pricing ends soon - Lock in lifetime access at 50% off before we switch to monthly pricing next week.

Transform Your Content Now

import * as React from "react"
import * as ScrollAreaPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-scroll-area"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

const ScrollArea = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root
    ref={ref}
    className={cn("relative overflow-hidden", className)}
    {...props}
  >
    <ScrollAreaPrimitive.Viewport className="h-full w-full rounded-[inherit]">
      {children}
    </ScrollAreaPrimitive.Viewport>
    <ScrollBar />
    <ScrollAreaPrimitive.Corner />
  </ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root>
))
ScrollArea.displayName = ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root.displayName

const ScrollBar = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof ScrollAreaPrimitive.ScrollAreaScrollbar>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ScrollAreaPrimitive.ScrollAreaScrollbar>
>(({ className, orientation = "vertical", ...props }, ref) => (
  <ScrollAreaPrimitive.ScrollAreaScrollbar
    ref={ref}
    orientation={orientation}
    className={cn(
      "flex touch-none select-none transition-colors",
      orientation === "vertical" &&
        "h-full w-2.5 border-l border-l-transparent p-[1px]",
      orientation === "horizontal" &&
        "h-2.5 flex-col border-t border-t-transparent p-[1px]",
      className
    )}
    {...props}
  >
    <ScrollAreaPrimitive.ScrollAreaThumb className="relative flex-1 rounded-full bg-border" />
  </ScrollAreaPrimitive.ScrollAreaScrollbar>
))
ScrollBar.displayName = ScrollAreaPrimitive.ScrollAreaScrollbar.displayName

export { ScrollArea, ScrollBar }

content.layoutDescription: Centered, single-column layout with generous padding. The section should have a container width of around 800px max to maintain focus. Elements are stacked vertically in this order: headline, supporting text, CTA button. The button should be large and prominent.
content.layoutEmphasis: The CTA button is the primary focus, with the headline providing strong secondary emphasis. The layout uses negative space strategically to draw attention to these elements.
content.visualStyleNotes: Use a gradient background that suggests transformation and energy. The CTA button should use the brand's primary color with a subtle hover effect. Typography should be bold for the headline (possibly with a gradient text effect) and clear but lighter weight for supporting text. Add subtle sparkle or transformation icons as decorative elements to reinforce the transformation theme.
content.responsivenessNotes: On mobile devices, maintain the centered, single-column layout but reduce padding and text sizes proportionally. The CTA button should remain large and easily tappable, with a minimum touch target of 44px height.
content.headline: Transform Your Content Now
content.supportingText: Turn one blog post into weeks of engaging social media content in minutes. Join the smart content creators who are saving hours every week.
content.supportingVisualOrTrustSignal: Decorative sparkle icons positioned strategically around the CTA to create visual energy and draw attention to the action area.

plan.description: A landing page for ContentEngine, an AI-powered content repurposing tool that transforms blog posts into social media content. The page follows a logical flow from problem identification through solution presentation to social proof and conversion, using contrasting background colors to create visual interest and section separation.
